message.content:
@startuml
actor Customer
participant "TripFinder" as TripFinder #D3D8E5#000000 
object "Bicycle\n:bike_type = 'mountain'" as Bicycle1 #D3D8E5#000000 {
  bike_id : int <<generated>>
}
database TripsDB #D3D8E5#000000 

Customer -> TripFinder: suitable_trips(\non_date,\ndifficulty,\nneed_bike)
activate TripFinder

alt need_bike == true then
    loop for each trip in result set do
        alt route requires mountain bikes or customer prefers them then
            create participant "Bicycle\n:bike_type='road'\nbike_status=available" as Bike2 #D3D8E5#000000
            
            note over Bike2,Bicycle1:\nsuitable bicycle found!
            
            activate Bike2
            deactivate Bike2
        end
        
        opt if not available try next type...
           destroy Bike2
       else return first match
          break
      end
      
   end
   
else just find trips without checking bicycles availability.. skip this part entirely !!\n(no loops needed here).  

end


return list_of_suitably_matched_trip_objects_with_optional_attached_available_rental_options_if_any_were_found_during_processing_logic_above_which_may_have_included_multiple_iterations_over_different_potential_candidates_until_one_was_deemed_acceptable_according_to_business_rules_implemented_within_system_design_specifications_provided_by_stakeholders_responsible_for_defining_requirements_regarding_functionality_expectations_from_end_users_perspective_alongside_technical_constraints_associated_with_underlying_infrastructure_supporting_execution_environment_where_application_codebase_runs_continuously_monitoring_performance_metrics_throughout_lifecycle_management_phases_encompassed_entirely_behind_scenes_unseen_direct_interaction_points_exposed_via_user_interfaces_designed_specifically_facilitate_communication_between_human_operators_interfacing_software_components_comprising_complete_solution_offered_service_provider_domain_context_consideration_taken_into_account_when_formulating_strategy_approach_tackling_problem_space_identified_initial_analysis_stage_project_planning_process_followed_agile_methodology_practices_adhered_strictly_team_members_collaborating_closely_shared_goals_objectives_aligned_common_vision_future_state_target_outcome_measurable_success_criteria_defined_upfront_clear_guidelines_set_forth_governing_behavior_actions_decisions_made_collectively_group_effort_leveraging_diverse_skillsets_expertise_backgrounds_individual_contributors_brings_table_unique_value_proposition_position_strengthens_overall_capability_deliver_high_quality_results_timely_basis_budget_allocated_resources_optimized_utilization_maximize_roi_minimizing_risk_factors_impacting_negatively_progress_trajectory_deviation_original_plan_necessitating_corrective_action_take_place_promptly_avoid_complications_arising_downstream_consequences
